prepared_text:
October 17, 2019 
IGAl/SECT/10-19/06 
To 
National Stock Exchange of India limited 
Exchange Plaza, C - 1 . Block G 
Bandra Kurla Complex 
Bandra - (E) 
Mumbai - 400 051 
Symbol: INDIGO 
Dear Sir, 
To 
Department of Corporate Services 
BSE limited 
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers 
Dalal Street 
Mumbai - 400 001 
Scrip Code: 539448 
Sub 
Intimation for Board Meeting and Earnings CalLuod_er Regulation 29 and 30 of the 
SEBI (listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Re_gulatlons. 2015 
In compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulations, 2015 ("listing Regulations"), we would like to inform you that a meeting of the 
Board of Directors of lnterGlobe Aviation Limited (the "Company") is scheduled to be held on 
Thursday, October 24, 2019, inter-alia, to consider and approve the unaudited standalone and 
consolidated financial results of the Company for the 
quarter and half-year ended on 
September 30, 2019, subject to a limited review by the Statutory Auditors. 
In compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 read with the 
lnterGlobe Aviation limited - Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by 
Designated Persons, we hereby inform you that the trading window for trading in securities of 
the 
Company 
by 
the 
Designated 
Persons 
was 
closed 
with 
effect 
from 
September 23, 2019. In the absence of unusual developments, the trading window will reopen 
48 hours after the announcement of financial results by the Company. 
lnterGlobe Aviation limited 
Registered Office: Central Wing, Ground Floor, Thapor House, 124 Jonpoth, New Delhl-11 0 001, India. F 011-43513200. Email: corporote@golndigo.in 
Corporate Office: Level 1. Tower C, Global Business Park, MG Raad, Gurgaon-122 002, Horyana, India. T +91 124 435 2500. F +91 1 24 406 85 36 
golndlgo.ln 
CIN no.: L62100DL2004PLC129768 
 
r«m 
lnTeRGLOBe 

Further, in compliance with Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations, the schedule of earnings 
call in relation thereto is enclosed. 
This is for your information and record. 
Thanking you, 
For lnterGlobe Aviation limited 
Company Secretarv and Chief Compliance Officer 

InterGlobe Aviation Limited (“IndiGo”) to Announce Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2020 Results on 
October 24, 2019 
Gurgaon, October 17, 2019: IndiGo will be announcing its Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2020 
results on October 24, 2019. 
The Company will conduct a 60 minute conference call at 17:00 hours IST on October 24, 2019 
(open to investors / analysts in all regions), where senior management will discuss the
qa_section:
Company’s performance and answer questions from participants. To participate in the conference 
call, please dial the numbers provided below. 
Results will be available around 16:00 hours on Thursday, October 24, 2019 at the Company’s 
website 
(www.goindigo.in) 
or 
on 
the 
exchange 
website 
(www.nseindia.com/ 
www.bseindia.com). 
The call will also be recorded and will be archived at www.goindigo.in. In addition, a transcript of 
the conference call will be available on www.goindigo.in 
Date and Time 
October 24, 2019 at: 
17:00 hours IST 
19:30 hours HKT 
11:30 hours UTC 
07:30 hours ET

call
